must_not_claim: SOC 2 readiness, compliance, certification, Type I completion, Type II completion, or auditor validation
DPA coverage, BAA coverage, subprocessor approval, or provider zero retention
verified encryption, retention, deletion, logging, support access, or tenant isolation
that HoloEngine production customer payloads are never sent to providers or never stored
that HoloVerify benchmark/evidence handling is equivalent to production customer data handling

taxonomy.HoloGov: Included as HoloEngine governance, selector, and control layer.
taxonomy.HoloVerify: Separate benchmark/evidence mode; supports evaluation discipline but not production privacy claims.
taxonomy.HoloChat: Connected surface where relevant; conditional production scope only.
taxonomy.HoloBuild: Connected surface where relevant; conditional production scope only.
taxonomy.HoloBrain: Conditional only if enabled in deployment.

mode_boundary.production_customer_mode: Target design for bounded ALLOW/ESCALATE review with metadata-only audit logging by default.
mode_boundary.benchmark_evidence_mode: HoloVerify mode may preserve frozen prompts, raw provider outputs, scoring maps, trace files, runtime manifests, failure autopsies, provenance audits, and operational notes for benchmark integrity.

status_terms.draft_artifact_exists: A repo-backed draft artifact exists. This is not implementation or operating-effectiveness proof.
status_terms.target_control_only: A control is described as intended design but has not been verified as implemented.
status_terms.TBD: Evidence, contract posture, or deployment posture is unknown or not captured in these source artifacts.
status_terms.missing: The source artifacts identify a need, but no sufficient evidence artifact is present.

evidence_items.purpose: Establish target production customer-mode flow, connected surfaces, audit-log target, and mode boundaries.
evidence_items.buyer_facing_relevance: High: foundational buyer security review artifact.
evidence_items.claim_risk: Medium: safe as a draft architecture; high if described as implemented.

evidence_items.evidence_name: HoloEngine primary taxonomy with connected surfaces
evidence_items.purpose: Keep HoloEngine primary while listing HoloChat and HoloBuild as conditional connected surfaces.
missing_evidence: Deployment-specific scope decisions for HoloChat, HoloBuild, and HoloBrain
evidence_items.buyer_facing_relevance: High: prevents scope confusion in buyer reviews.
evidence_items.claim_risk: Medium: risk if connected surfaces are implied to be covered automatically.

evidence_items.purpose: Map Security, Availability, Confidentiality, Privacy, and Processing Integrity to HoloEngine target controls and gaps.
evidence_items.buyer_facing_relevance: High: central SOC 2 planning artifact.
evidence_items.claim_risk: High: must not be described as SOC 2 readiness, compliance, certification, or auditor validation.

evidence_items.purpose: Track proof needed for each readiness control with owner role and status.
evidence_items.buyer_facing_relevance: High: helps answer enterprise evidence requests with status discipline.
evidence_items.claim_risk: Medium: safe as an index; high if statuses are softened.

evidence_items.purpose: Prevent unsupported SOC 2, HIPAA, zero-retention, TLS, RAM-only, and production-control claims.
evidence_items.buyer_facing_relevance: High: reduces buyer-facing misstatement risk.
evidence_items.claim_risk: Low if preserved; high if omitted from external materials.

evidence_items.purpose: Explain purposes, data classes, retention choices, deletion handling, and customer instructions if personal data is processed.
evidence_items.buyer_facing_relevance: High: likely enterprise procurement requirement.
evidence_items.claim_risk: High: must remain TBD until legal and deployment review.

evidence_items.purpose: Define intake, identity verification, deletion steps, SLA, exceptions, and completion evidence.
evidence_items.buyer_facing_relevance: High: important for privacy and enterprise data handling.
evidence_items.claim_risk: High: do not claim deletion capability without tested workflow.

evidence_items.purpose: Define explicit customer configuration, retention settings, access controls, deletion, export, and support boundaries.
evidence_items.buyer_facing_relevance: High: key regulated-audit feature if implemented.
evidence_items.claim_risk: High: must not imply payload retention controls are operating.

evidence_items.purpose: Index OpenAI, xAI, and MiniMax as current benchmark/provider route vendors and list verification workstreams.
evidence_items.buyer_facing_relevance: High: buyer questions will focus on provider handling.
evidence_items.claim_risk: High: must not imply provider terms are verified.

evidence_items.purpose: Confirm whether provider DPAs cover the actual HoloEngine route/account/configuration.
evidence_items.buyer_facing_relevance: High: common enterprise requirement.
evidence_items.claim_risk: High: do not claim DPA coverage.

evidence_items.purpose: Determine whether healthcare positioning is possible and under what provider/product scope.
evidence_items.buyer_facing_relevance: Medium if healthcare buyers are pursued.
evidence_items.claim_risk: High: do not claim HIPAA readiness or BAA coverage.

evidence_items.purpose: Verify retention settings, zero-retention eligibility if available, and route/account applicability.
evidence_items.buyer_facing_relevance: High: sensitive buyer data-handling issue.
evidence_items.claim_risk: High: do not claim provider zero retention.

evidence_items.purpose: Track provider subprocessors, update cadence, regional processing/storage options, and customer-region constraints.
evidence_items.buyer_facing_relevance: High for enterprise and regulated buyers.
evidence_items.claim_risk: High: do not claim subprocessor approval or residency guarantees.

evidence_items.purpose: Show provider, model, route ID, retry/error status, latency, token counts, and retention mode without default payload logging.
evidence_items.buyer_facing_relevance: High: explains AI route accountability.
evidence_items.claim_risk: High: do not claim production logging until samples exist.

evidence_items.purpose: Bind decisions to selector version/hash, worker contract version/hash where applicable, and release manifest.
evidence_items.buyer_facing_relevance: High: important for decision reproducibility.
evidence_items.claim_risk: Medium: safe as target; high if described as fully implemented.

evidence_items.purpose: Prove benchmark scoring maps and answer keys are access-controlled and excluded from production and provider prompts.
evidence_items.buyer_facing_relevance: Medium: relevant for AI governance and benchmark integrity.
evidence_items.claim_risk: High: leakage claims need tests.

evidence_items.purpose: Preserve reviewability through trace hashes, tamper-evident storage, access logs, and chain-of-custody procedures.
evidence_items.buyer_facing_relevance: High for technical diligence and dispute review.
evidence_items.claim_risk: Medium: benchmark traces exist conceptually, but production integrity is unverified.

evidence_items.evidence_name: Failure autopsy template and corrective-action workflow
evidence_items.purpose: Define how benchmark and production failures are classified, reviewed, remediated, and turned into regression coverage.
evidence_items.buyer_facing_relevance: Medium: useful for mature AI assurance discussions.
evidence_items.claim_risk: Medium: do not imply operating process exists.

evidence_items.purpose: Govern model onboarding, deprecation, provider fallback, eval gates, rollback, risk signoff, and customer notice criteria.
evidence_items.buyer_facing_relevance: High: buyers will ask how model changes are controlled.
evidence_items.claim_risk: High: do not claim controlled model changes.

evidence_items.evidence_name: Production customer mode and benchmark/evidence mode boundary memo
evidence_items.purpose: Preserve distinction between metadata-only production target handling and HoloVerify evidence preservation.
evidence_items.buyer_facing_relevance: High: central to safe buyer explanation.
evidence_items.claim_risk: Medium: safe as boundary claim; high if used as implementation proof.

evidence_items.purpose: Prove benchmark artifacts are stored, accessed, retained, and described separately from production customer data.
evidence_items.buyer_facing_relevance: Medium: important when benchmark evidence is discussed externally.
evidence_items.claim_risk: High: do not use benchmark retention as production privacy proof.

evidence_items.purpose: Prove caller authentication, tenant identification, authorization validation, and request binding.
evidence_items.buyer_facing_relevance: High: core enterprise security requirement.
evidence_items.claim_risk: High: do not claim implemented auth.

evidence_items.purpose: Define roles, permissions, admin/support access, service accounts, approvals, and access review cadence.
evidence_items.buyer_facing_relevance: High: common SOC 2 and buyer control.
evidence_items.claim_risk: High: do not claim RBAC maturity.

evidence_items.purpose: Prove tenant/request isolation across runtime, storage, logs, traces, evidence stores, queues, and provider routing.
evidence_items.buyer_facing_relevance: High: critical buyer control.
evidence_items.claim_risk: High: do not claim tenant isolation proof.

evidence_items.purpose: Govern customer support access, just-in-time elevation, customer authorization, redaction, logging, and break-glass review.
evidence_items.buyer_facing_relevance: High if support may access customer data.
evidence_items.claim_risk: High: do not claim support controls exist.

evidence_items.purpose: Track approvals, tests, deployment records, rollback, and emergency changes for HoloEngine.
evidence_items.buyer_facing_relevance: High: SOC 2 and enterprise review staple.
evidence_items.claim_risk: Medium: target versioning exists, operating evidence missing.

evidence_items.purpose: Prove code review, branch protection, SAST/dependency scanning, secret scanning, threat modeling, and release gates.
evidence_items.buyer_facing_relevance: High: expected in SOC 2 readiness reviews.
evidence_items.claim_risk: High: do not claim secure SDLC operating effectiveness.

evidence_items.purpose: Ensure provider fallback, model roster, and data-sharing scope changes receive approval and buyer-impact review if applicable.
evidence_items.buyer_facing_relevance: High: directly affects customer data flow.
evidence_items.claim_risk: High: do not claim controlled provider changes.

evidence_items.evidence_name: Incident response plan and tabletop evidence
evidence_items.purpose: Define severity levels, escalation, customer notification, evidence preservation, remediation, and post-incident review.
evidence_items.buyer_facing_relevance: High: standard enterprise request.
evidence_items.claim_risk: High: do not claim IR readiness.

evidence_items.evidence_name: AI failure and model-route incident process
evidence_items.purpose: Handle false allow, false escalate, no-select, parse failure, provider failure, leakage, and route-change incidents.
evidence_items.buyer_facing_relevance: Medium: differentiates AI assurance program.
evidence_items.claim_risk: Medium: do not imply active operating cadence.

evidence_items.purpose: Define retention periods, disposal controls, legal holds, customer-enabled evidence retention, and storage classes.
evidence_items.buyer_facing_relevance: High: core buyer and privacy concern.
evidence_items.claim_risk: High: do not claim production retention behavior.

evidence_items.purpose: Show how deleted data and evidence-retention artifacts are handled in backups and restores.
evidence_items.buyer_facing_relevance: Medium: needed for privacy and SOC 2 availability/confidentiality.
evidence_items.claim_risk: High: do not claim deletion is complete without backup handling.

evidence_items.purpose: Define fields for timestamp, tenant ID, request ID, route, model/provider versions, selector hash, verdict, latency, tokens, errors, retries, and evidence-retention mode flag.
evidence_items.buyer_facing_relevance: High: useful buyer control story if framed as target.
evidence_items.claim_risk: High: do not claim logs are operating.

evidence_items.purpose: Prove centralized logs, alert rules, anomaly detection, uptime checks, access controls, and retention settings.
evidence_items.buyer_facing_relevance: High for SOC 2 Security and Availability.
evidence_items.claim_risk: High: do not claim monitoring coverage.

evidence_items.purpose: Show who can access logs, how log integrity is protected, and how sensitive payload fields are excluded by default.
evidence_items.buyer_facing_relevance: High: supports confidentiality and auditability.
evidence_items.claim_risk: High: do not claim payload exclusion without samples/tests.

evidence_items.purpose: Verify TLS/provider API transport/internal service transport and certificate management in deployment.
evidence_items.buyer_facing_relevance: High: standard buyer request.
evidence_items.claim_risk: High: do not claim TLS version or coverage.

evidence_items.purpose: Verify encryption for databases, object stores, logs, evidence stores, backups, and key management.
evidence_items.buyer_facing_relevance: High: standard buyer request.
evidence_items.claim_risk: High: do not claim encryption coverage.

evidence_items.purpose: Centralize secrets storage, rotation, access logging, CI/CD secret handling, and secret scanning.
evidence_items.buyer_facing_relevance: High: standard SOC 2 security control.
evidence_items.claim_risk: High: do not claim secrets management maturity.

evidence_items.purpose: Define scan cadence, severity SLAs, patch workflow, penetration testing, dependency inventory, and exceptions.
evidence_items.buyer_facing_relevance: High: standard buyer and SOC 2 evidence request.
evidence_items.claim_risk: High: do not claim vulnerability program coverage.

evidence_items.purpose: Define backup scope, restore tests, RTO/RPO, DR runbook, dependency failure response, and periodic validation.
evidence_items.buyer_facing_relevance: Medium to high if production service availability is in scope.
evidence_items.claim_risk: High: do not claim availability resilience.

evidence_items.purpose: Provide safe statements for enterprise buyers while preserving TBD and must-not-claim boundaries.
evidence_items.buyer_facing_relevance: High: supports immediate buyer conversations.
evidence_items.claim_risk: Medium: low if caveats stay visible; high if shortened into claims.

evidence_items.purpose: Convert verified and target-only items into a buyer-safe Q&A with explicit TBD boundaries.
evidence_items.buyer_facing_relevance: High: common procurement artifact.
evidence_items.claim_risk: High: must not overstate unverified controls.

evidence_items.purpose: Explain data classes, production versus benchmark mode, provider exposure, retention, deletion, and support access.
evidence_items.buyer_facing_relevance: High: critical for buyer review.
evidence_items.claim_risk: High: must not claim privacy controls or provider terms are verified.

evidence_items.purpose: Provide approved provider/vendor/subprocessor disclosure when contract and subprocessor review is complete.
evidence_items.buyer_facing_relevance: High: enterprise requirement.
evidence_items.claim_risk: High: do not imply subprocessors are approved.

evidence_items.purpose: Package target architecture, claim boundaries, provider TBDs, retention mode choices, and evidence gaps for design partners.
evidence_items.buyer_facing_relevance: High for early enterprise pilots.
evidence_items.claim_risk: High: must not imply production certification or operating effectiveness.

immediate_binder_actions: Assign a named owner to each likely owner role.
Create evidence folders for Trust, Security, Privacy, Legal, Engineering, SRE, Product, Support, HoloGov, and HoloVerify.
Convert each missing, TBD, and target_control_only item into tracked work with due date and evidence location.
Create a buyer-claim register that maps approved phrases to evidence artifacts and blocks unsupported claims.
Keep HoloVerify benchmark/evidence artifacts physically and semantically separate from production customer-mode evidence.
